creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to parv from comment #3)

OK that makes sense. As a port maintainer, poudriere is the only way I can be sure that subtly tainted build environments don't get in the way of reproducing issues.

If you run into something like this again, I'm happy to help you get enough poudriere set up to test this locally.

thanks for the bug report all the same!
